title: Lucky TNT Mod
description: Over 200 different TNTs to destroy your minecraft world!
body:
# Lucky TNT Mod 🧨

![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/NpAr5ha.png 'Lucky TNT Banner')

## ✏️About
Destroy your world with the Lucky TNT Mod! Inspired by TooMuchTNT with tons of old and new TNTs!

## 💥You got questions or ideas?
Join the SlimingHD & Fleshcrafter Discord Server [here](https://discord.gg/r2fNVSfNAA) and meet us, the developers of this mod and many other nice people! You can chat with us, ask questions, report bugs, give ideas and get a closer look on our upcoming projects!

## 🧨Lucky TNT Lib
Download the Lucky TNT Lib [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/lucky-tnt-lib)! Required if you use the 1.19.2 and above version.

## 🚧Progress

**NeoForge:**\

1.20.5/1.20.6 - Final / Updates may come\

**Fabric:**\

1.20.5/1.20.6 - Final / Updates may come\

1.20.2 - W.I.P.\
1.20/1.20.1 - W.I.P.\
1.19.4 or older - Not planned

## 💥200+ TNTs & Dynamite
- Attacking TNT
- Deathray
- Supernova
- TNT x10000
- Say Goodbye
- Withering TNT
- Hydrogen Bomb
- a vacuum cleaner 

and lots more!

## ❓FAQ
### How to install this mod?
If you don't know how to install our mod, we recommend you watching this video: [How To Install Minecraft Mods (2022)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fx2L0vYowKc)

### Is this Too Much TNT?
This mod is inspired by the TooMuchTNT Mod (download [here](https://minecrafttntstuffsmods.weebly.com/too-much-tnt---downloads.html)), which has not been getting an update after the version 1.8. So we decided to recreate the mod for a newer version: 1.14.4, 1.16.5 and 1.18.2\
All TNTs you saw in the original are also in this mod, with almost the same functionality! But we are also working on a lot of new and interesting TNTs and features, so there is always something new to look forward to! If you want to see TNT in action or give ideas make sure to subscribe to Lekoopa's Youtube Channel [here](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClIlxtpf7y3CyfS-7y-lesg) (Videos are in german)!  

### Is there a way to stop the Doomsday tnt?
The effect of the TNT lasts for 10 - 20 minutes until it decays naturally. If you you want to speed up the process you can use the Disaster Clearer TNT or (if you want to cheat) one of the commands below to stop it immediately:\
/ltmdisaster -> to display the duration\
/ltmdisaster clear -> stops disaster 

### Where can I find the April Fools version?
We decided to upload all special versions onto a seperat project. If you are looking for April Fools or other special versions, click [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lucky-tnt-mod-archive/) to see and be able to download all of our no longer available files!
